ad_copy.headline: Elevate Your Space
ad_copy.body_copy: Discover the art of premium architecture with Unknown Brand. Transform your vision into reality with our expert craftsmanship.

variations.label: Variation A - Primary
variations.headline: Timeless Design
variations.body_copy: Crafted for those who appreciate the finer details in architecture. Experience the Unknown Brand difference.

variations.label: Variation B - Emotional
variations.headline: Built to Inspire
variations.body_copy: Every structure tells a story. Let Unknown Brand help you write yours with unparalleled design excellence.

variations.label: Variation C - Direct
variations.headline: Premium Architecture
variations.body_copy: Unmatched quality and sophistication. Choose Unknown Brand for your next project.

visual_direction.layout_description: Minimalist layout with a central architectural element, surrounded by negative space for a clean, premium feel.
visual_direction.composition: Asymmetrical balance with the architectural element slightly off-center, creating dynamic visual interest.
visual_direction.color_usage: Primary brand colors (#E6D5C3, #351E1C) used in a refined gradient background. Accent color (#DCDAD9) for highlights.
visual_direction.typography_usage: Helvetica in bold for headlines, regular for body copy, ensuring clarity and professionalism.
visual_direction.imagery_style: Cinematic, ultra-premium architectural photography with dramatic lighting and sleek details.
visual_direction.mood: Sophisticated, immersive, and luxurious with a cool, editorial tone.

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: minimal premium design, soft cinematic lighting, global illumination, glassmorphism, front-facing editorial framing, NO text, NO logos
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: luxury modern aesthetic, minimal design, cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic, clean composition, soft shadows, high-end editorial style, NO text, NO logos --ar 1:1 --v 6.0
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, UI elements, cluttered, complex, low quality

zones.top: Headline and subheadline in bold Helvetica, centered at the top.
zones.middle: Central architectural element with dramatic lighting, occupying 60% of the frame.
zones.bottom: Body copy and CTA button, aligned to the bottom with ample negative space.

layout_spec.spacing_notes: 20px padding on all sides, 40px between headline and visual element, 30px between visual element and body copy.

brand_compliance_notes: This campaign aligns with Unknown Brand's professional and trustworthy personality, using its designated color palette and typography for consistency.
ab_testing_tips: Test different headlines and CTAs to see which resonates best with the audience. Monitor engagement rates and click-throughs.
